calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-28-2006 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Teddy Tsao-Wu, Esq. for Plaintiff: Jeremy Tam, also present.
Brian Wong, Esq. for Defendants: Jian Wei Zhao, Wah Ming Mark and Yu Zhao, present with Cantonese Interpreter: Trihn Green, sworn.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendants agreed to vacate on or before, July 31, 2006.
Plaintiff waived rents through July 31, 2006, and to pays $500.00 in addtition to the statutory amount of $3,000.00 to the Defendants.
No Judgment against the Defendants until breached of these agreements.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.
